name: Painted Legend 2
short_description: Painted Legend 2 is an atmospheric platformer crafted in a unique grid notebook style. It continues the story begun in Painted Legend, as the player once again steps into a hand-drawn world filled with adventure, danger, and mystery.
detailed_description:
Painted Legend 2 is an atmospheric platformer crafted in a unique grid notebook style. It continues the story begun in Painted Legend, as the player once again steps into a hand-drawn world filled with adventure, danger, and mystery.

In the north, an ancient evil has awakened - a mysterious necromancer spreads fear and destruction. The wizard Partas and his nephew, the warrior Favian, embark on a distant journey to stop the looming threat. Along the way, new playable characters will be introduced, each with their own abilities and combat style.

This is a world where every line and stroke is part of a living narrative. You’ll experience thoughtful platforming, exploration, combat, and a distinctive visual atmosphere where imagination comes to life on grid-lined pages.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, German*
*languages with full audio support
